mapper.select: SELECT seq_crm_customer_behavior.NEXTVAL FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= #{count}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO crm_customer_behavior (id, customer_id, behavior_type, description, behavior_time, create_time) VALUES (#{item.id}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.behaviorType}, #{item.description}, #{item.behaviorTime}, sysdate)
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
